The unique identifier for the smart group.
For type-> 'UserGroups' and 'OrganizationGroups', this corresponds to their associated/mapped smart group UUID (if any).
For type-> 'SmartGroups', this field would be the same as 'uuid' field of this response model.

include_numbers.description: If true, the generated password can contain numbers.

include_special_characters.description: If true, the generated password can contain special characters.

length.description: The length of the password that will be generated. The minimum and the maximum length of the password are 8 and 64 respectively.

Payload based on we will search the profile where payload has been configured.
Search is performed based on payload names for all platforms, however search will be performed on basis of GlobalizationKey as well for macOS platform.

clear_password.description: If true, ignores the password policy in the request and clears the password set on the device.

current_password.description: The current recovery lock password set on the device. If provided, will be used for issuing the command to set a new password or clear the existing password. If not provided, the last Applied Password via Workspace ONE UEM will be used.

info.description: Workspace ONE UEM MDM REST API V3
info.title: MDM API V3

post.description: This API is for executing actions on give set of devices.

400.description: 1. {5138: Feature is currently turned off}  3. {5139: Admin action cannot be performed on more than {0} number of devices in one go.}

403.description: Forbidden 4. { 8168: Admin action is not allowed for {0} Devices under the organization group {0}. }

422.description: UnprocessableEntity 1.{6070 : Required parameters for actions are missing.}

post.description: Executes a command for the specified device alternate identifier. Supported commands are SetRecoveryLock (macOS only), DeviceWipe (macOS only).

parameters.description: The name of the command to execute. Supported command types [SetRecoveryLock, DeviceWipe, CancelPendingWipe].(Required).
parameters.name: commandName

parameters.description: Search by Alternate Id type [MacAddress, Udid, SerialNumber, ImeiNumber, EasId].(Required).
parameters.name: searchBy

parameters.description: The Alternate Id.(Required).
parameters.name: id

400.description: 1. {6213: Device is not enrolled.} 2. {5101: Command not found for the input device and command type.} 3. {5102: Command is not supported.} 4. {5287: Either the command request or the password policy is empty for SetRecoveryLock. } 5. {5291: Invalid obliteration behavior value.} 6. {5292: PIN for macOS device must be 6 digits long.}

404.description: 1. {5002: Device not found for specified alternate id: id and type: searchBy}

422.description: 1. {5003: Invalid searchby parameter.} 2. {1012: The value of set_recovery_lock.password_policy.length must be between 8 and 64.}

post.summary: New - Executes a command for device by alternate identifier.

get.description: Get basic information about the device with maximum pagesize limit of 500. If page size is greater than the maximum limit, it will return the first 500 records.

parameters.description: Username the device enrolled under.
parameters.name: user

parameters.description: Partial search by device model. Search by MD20 would return device with model MD200LL.
parameters.name: model_identifier

parameters.description: Device platform type, i.e. Apple, Android, WindowsPC, etc.
parameters.name: device_type

parameters.description: Last seen date string.
parameters.name: last_seen

parameters.description: Device ownership.
parameters.name: ownership

parameters.description: Organization Group to be searched. User's OG is considered if not specified.
parameters.name: organization_group_uuid

parameters.description: Compliance status.
parameters.name: compliance_status

parameters.description: Specifies the date filter for device search, which retrieves the devices that are seen after this date.
parameters.name: seen_since

parameters.description: Friendly name of the device to be searched.
parameters.name: friendly_name

parameters.description: Specific page number to get. 0 based index.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Maximum records per page. Default 500.
parameters.name: page_size

parameters.description: Order by column name.
parameters.name: order_by

parameters.description: Sorting order. Values ASC or DESC. Defaults to ASC.
parameters.name: sort_order

404.description: 1. {6: Organization Group with id :{} not found or Admin user does not have access to it}

get.summary: New - Searches the device using the query information provided.

post.description: Executes a command for a device by device uuid. Supported commands are SetRecoveryLock (macOS only), DeviceWipe (macOS only), CustomMdmCommand (macOS only).

parameters.description:
The Device unique identifier.
            Accepted format is **guid**
            E.g. 0258902A-9E0C-4DC5-A997-9E079559F75E(Required).
parameters.name: deviceUuid

parameters.description: The name of the command to execute. Supported command types [SetRecoveryLock, DeviceWipe, CustomMdmCommand, CancelPendingWipe].(Required).
parameters.name: commandName

400.description: 1. {6213: Device is not enrolled.} 2. {5101: Command not found for the input device and command type.} 3. {5102: Command is not supported.} 4. {5287: Either the command request or the password policy is empty for SetRecoveryLock. } 5. {5291: Invalid obliteration behavior value.} 6. {5292: PIN for macOS device must be 6 digits long.} 7. {5104: Command XML cannot be null or empty.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {5002: Device not found for specified uuid: deviceUuid.}

422.description: 1. {1012: The value of set_recovery_lock.password_policy.length must be between 8 and 64.}

post.summary: New - Executes a command for a device by the device uuid.

post.description: For an existing profile in pending state, upload the completed profile for a given device

parameters.description: Unique identifier for the device
parameters.name: deviceUuid

parameters.description: Unique identifier for the profile
parameters.name: profileUuid

parameters.description: Specifies the type of payload wrapped in the CMS body
parameters.name: format

403.description: 1. { ????: Not allowed to access device }2. { ????: Not allowed to access profile }

404.description: 1. { ????: The specified profile was not found for the requested device }

post.summary: Uploads a completed (already built for device) profile

get.description: Get basic information about the device based on the unique identifier passed in the path. The response contains hypermedia links, which can be followed to get more information about the device.

parameters.description: Device unique identifier.(Required)
parameters.name: uuid

404.description: 1. {5061: Device not found} 2. {5177: Organization group not found.}

get.summary: New - Get basic details about the device.

post.description: Register multiple devices and create enrollment tokens.

put.description:
1. If the add_version attribute is empty or false a new Profile version will not be created but AssignedSmartGroups RootLocationGroup AssignedGeofenceArea and AssignedSchedule will be saved and published. 
2. If it is true new version of the profile will be created and published.
3. For Version 2004, only Windows Defender Payload is supported.
